name: dsp_mult_unsigned_const_operand
description: Code should include multiplication of a signal operand with an explicitly $unsigned() cast constant operand, processed by ice40_dsp pass

name: dsp_mult_signed_const_operand
description: Code should include multiplication of a signed signal operand with an explicitly $signed() cast constant operand, processed by ice40_dsp pass

name: dsp_unextend_on_nonconstant_only
description: Code should include ice40_dsp pass usage where multiplication operands should be processed without calling unextend on constant values
snippet:
read_verilog <<EOT
module top(input wire [14:0] a, output wire [31:0] b);
assign b = a*$unsigned(5'b01111);
endmodule
EOT
prep
ice40_dsp
write_rtlil
